verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Alpha and Omega, beginning and the end, Jesus, our Messiah, the Lamb that was slain, Savior and Healer, Redeemer and friend, You are forever God and King.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I exalt You God of all creation, I exalt You my God, I exalt You ruler of the nations, You are forever God and King, King of the ages, ancient of days.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Awesome in power, great are Your ways, Glory and honor, worship and praise, Be unto You Lord all my days.
